Cropped Sudoku puzzle grid with pre-filled numbers and some empty cells, likely for logic or pattern testing.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A["ENVIRONMENT"] -->|feedback| B["LEARNING AUTOMATION"]
    B --> C["T = {T₁, T₂, ..., Tₗ}"]
    B --> D["P = {p₁, p₂, ..., pₗ}"]
```

1: FinalizedCells \(\Leftarrow 0\)
2:
3: for each cell \(C_{i,j}\) do
4:    if \(d_{i,j} == \| N_{i,j}\|\) then
5:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot r(d_{i,j})\)
6:    FinalizedCells + +
7:    else
8:    if \(d_{i,j} > max[d_{k,l},\) for each \(C_{k,l} \in N_{i,j}\) where \(c_{k,l} = c_{i,j}\) then
9:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot r(d_{i,j})\)
10:    else
11:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot p(d_{i,j})\)
12:    end if
13:    end if
14: end for
15:
16: if FinalizedCells < TotalCells then
17:    goto line 1
18: end if

1: FinalizedCells \(\Leftarrow 0\)
2:
3: for each cell \(C_{i,j}\) do
4:    if \(d_{i,j} == \| N_{i,j}\|\) then
5:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot r(d_{i,j}, l_r)\)
6:    FinalizedCells++
7:    else
8:    if \(d_{i,j} > max[d_{k,l}\), for each \(C_{k,l} \in N_{i,j}\) where \(c_{k,l} = c_{i,j}\) then
9:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot r(d_{i,j}, l_r)\)
10:    else
11:    \(P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^t) = P_{i,j}^t(c_{i,j}^t) \cdot p(d_{i,j}, l_p)\)
12:    end if
13:    end if
14: end for
15:
16: if FinalizedCells < TotalCells then
17:    goto line 1
18: end if

content:
1: for each cell  \( C_{i,j} \)  do
2: if  \( \sum_{C_{k,l}\in N_{i,j}^{c}} c_{k,l} \neq SN \)  or  \( \sum_{C_{k,l}\in N_{i,j}^{r}} c_{k,l} \neq SN \)  or  \( \sum_{C_{k,l}\in N_{i,j}^{sg}} c_{k,l} \neq SN \)  then
3: if  \( P_{i,j}^{t}(c_{i,j}^{t}) > 0 \)  then
4:  \( P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^{t}) = 1 \) 
5: else
6:  \( P_{i,j}^{t+1}(c_{i,j}^{t}) = 0 \) 
7: end if
8: end if
9: end for
10:
11: goto line 1
